hero.description: Build a sustainable long-term asset through professionally managed vineyard investments.

investmentIntro.title: An Investment Model Growing with the Power of <gold>Land</gold>
investmentIntro.description: Vineyards are not only agricultural production areas. When managed correctly, they become real assets that can generate value across generations, provide resilience against inflation and offer genuine return potential.
investmentIntro.emphasis: We manage this value for you.

valueTime.question: How long does it take for a vineyard investment to gain value?
valueTime.answer: Vineyard investment is a long-term model. Value growth develops over time through land location, production efficiency and professional operation.

ownership.question: Is the title deed registered to me?
ownership.answer: Ownership and usage rights are clearly defined according to the investment model. All details are shared transparently during the investment process.

production.question: Who manages the production?
production.answer: Vineyard care, production and operational processes are professionally managed by expert teams.

incomeModel.question: How does the income model work?
incomeModel.answer: The income model operates through production income, value appreciation and distribution principles defined by the investment structure.

minimumInvestment.question: What is the minimum investment amount?
minimumInvestment.answer: The minimum investment amount may vary depending on the vineyard portfolio and investment period. We can evaluate the suitable model together.

exit.question: Is there an exit or resale option?
exit.answer: Exit and resale options are planned according to the investment structure. Details are clarified during the investment consultation.

cta.title: Let’s Plan Your <gold>Vineyard Investment</gold> Together
cta.description: Our expert team is ready to identify the investment model best suited to you.
cta.imageAlt: Vineyard landscape and investment consultation atmosphere

hero.description: Each vineyard is carefully selected and professionally managed according to its potential to create long-term value.
hero.imageAlt: Selected vineyards and mountain landscape at sunset

portfolioApproach.title: Not every land is <gold>an investment.</gold>
portfolioApproach.lead: Vineyard investment is not simply about buying land. It requires identifying soil and locations capable of creating long-term value.
portfolioApproach.paragraph1: Every vineyard included in our portfolio is evaluated through climate, altitude, soil structure, water access and production potential.
portfolioApproach.paragraph2: Our goal is not only to select productive land today, but to professionally manage vineyards with the capacity to create value for generations.
portfolioApproach.imageAlt: Mountain landscape and selected vineyard portfolio

activePortfolio.title: Konya Bozkır Vineyard Estate
activePortfolio.description: Located in the high-altitude, mineral-rich lands of Konya, our vineyard has been selected for sustainable grape production and long-term value appreciation. With extensive sunshine exposure, fertile soil structure, and professional vineyard management, it offers strong production quality and investment potential.

whyKonya.title: High altitude, strong sunlight and <gold>mineral-rich soil.</gold>
whyKonya.description: Konya Bozkır offers strong potential for vineyard investment and sustainable grape production through its climate, altitude and soil structure. These qualities support both production quality and long-term investment value.
whyKonya.imageAlt: Konya steppe and historic city silhouette

altitude.title: High Altitude
altitude.description: Altitude above 1,200 meters supports cool nights, balanced ripening and stronger grape character.

sunshine.title: Long Sunshine Exposure
sunshine.description: Extended daily sunlight helps create a balanced sugar profile and aromatic structure in Sultaniye grapes.

soil.title: Mineral-Rich Soil
soil.description: Limestone and mineral-rich soil structure improves vineyard productivity and production quality.

story.title: This land is a legacy, and this vineyard is an investment in the future.
story.paragraph1: The Konya Bozkır Vineyard Estate was selected not only for today's production capacity but also for its ability to create value for generations.
story.paragraph2: Its high altitude, mineral-rich soil structure and extended sunshine exposure support sustainable grape production and long-term appreciation potential.
story.paragraph3: Through professional management, we oversee production processes and continuously protect and improve the vineyard on behalf of our investors.
story.imageAlt: Harvested grape clusters and vineyard workers

climate.title: Climate Risk
climate.description: Climate data is monitored regularly; drought and frost risks are reduced through suitable agricultural techniques.

operation.title: Operational Risk
operation.description: Planting, maintenance, irrigation and harvest processes are managed according to a standardized operation plan.

production.title: Production Risk
production.description: Soil, plant health and productivity are tracked through regular field inspections.

market.title: Market Risk
market.description: Product value, sales channels and pricing strategies are planned with market analysis.

financial.title: Financial Risk
financial.description: Asset protection, reporting and financial planning processes are carried out transparently.

transparentManagement.title: Investors Can Track Every Stage.

monthlyReports.description: Production, maintenance and financial performance are shared through regular reports.

productionData.title: Production Data

financialTransparency.title: Financial Transparency
financialTransparency.description: Income, expenses and return details are reported clearly.

annualCycle.title: The Vineyard Value Creation Process
annualCycle.description: Professional vineyard management progresses through planned operations throughout the year; production, quality and harvest are transformed into economic value.

january.title: Pruning
january.description: Seasonal planning is carried out and the vineyard is prepared for efficient production.

march.title: Growth Management

june.title: Yield Control
june.description: Cluster development, plant health and quality potential are regularly tracked.

september.title: Harvest Preparation
september.description: Ripeness level, sugar balance and quality criteria are evaluated.

hero.description: We believe that long-term value is created by selecting the right lands and managing them professionally.
hero.imageAlt: Vineyard estate and modern investment structure at sunset

whyWeExist.title: We exist to carry nature’s potential <gold>into the future.</gold>
whyWeExist.paragraph1: At Bağ Bahçe Yatırım, we believe agricultural production is not only a source of short-term income, but a real asset that can create long-term value when managed professionally.
whyWeExist.paragraph2: Our purpose is to develop vineyard lands whose climate, altitude, soil structure and production potential have been carefully analyzed through a professional agricultural management approach.
whyWeExist.paragraph3: By sharing the same vision with our investors, we offer a trusted investment model built on sustainable production, transparent reporting and long-term land appreciation.
whyWeExist.imageAlt: Professional vineyard land extending toward mountains at sunset

founderValues.quote: We do not see land as a commodity. When managed properly, land creates lasting value that can be carried across generations.
founderValues.description: At Bağ Bahçe Yatırım, our purpose is to protect and develop carefully selected vineyard lands while creating long-term value together with our investors.
founderValues.name: Veysel Karakus
founderValues.imageAlt: Black and white desk photo of the founder working on investment notes

longTermVision.title: Long-Term Vision
longTermVision.description: Instead of short-term gains, we focus on agricultural value creation that can continue for generations.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We openly share production, management and performance processes with our investors.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We adopt methods that protect the soil, use natural resources efficiently and support production quality.

disciplinedManagement.title: Disciplined Management
disciplinedManagement.description: Through data-driven analysis and professional operations, we aim to reduce risks and increase value.

expertiseBridge.title: We combine agricultural expertise with <gold>institutional investment discipline.</gold>
expertiseBridge.description1: At Bağ Bahçe Yatırım, we bring together hands-on vineyard management experience, land stewardship and agricultural production expertise with a data-driven investment approach.
expertiseBridge.description2: Every vineyard is evaluated based on climate, altitude, soil composition and production potential. Every investment decision is guided by a long-term value creation strategy.
expertiseBridge.imageAlt: Professional vineyard management and agricultural investment landscape

futureVision.title: Building <gold>Tomorrow’s Value</gold> on Today’s Land.
futureVision.paragraph1: We believe the future of agriculture will be shaped by data-driven management, sustainable farming practices and professional land stewardship.
futureVision.paragraph2: Our purpose is not only to manage today's production, but to cultivate productive, resilient and sustainable vineyard assets that create value for future generations.
futureVision.paragraph3: Together with our investors, we aim to generate long-term growth, recurring agricultural income and enduring land appreciation through disciplined vineyard investment and management.

faq.imageAlt: Sunlit vineyard and ripe grape clusters

office.question: Do you have a physical office?
office.answer: We operate through a field-focused and digital communication model. We stay in touch with our investors through online meetings, phone calls and project site visits.

faceToFace.question: Can we meet in person?
faceToFace.answer: Upon request, we can organize in-person meetings in Istanbul or at suitable project sites. The first evaluation is usually carried out through an online meeting.

minimumInvestment.question: What is the minimum investment amount?
minimumInvestment.answer: The minimum investment amount may vary depending on the selected vineyard portfolio and investment model. Our experts will share the most suitable model based on your goals.

investmentDuration.question: How long is the investment period?
investmentDuration.answer: Vineyard investment is a long-term value creation model. Production income, land appreciation and professional management are evaluated together over time.

cta.title: Let’s Evaluate Your <gold>Vineyard Investment Together.</gold>
cta.description: During the initial consultation, we understand your goals, expectations and investment approach to evaluate the vineyard investment model best suited to you.
cta.note: The initial consultation is free. Meetings can be planned online or at suitable project sites.
cta.imageAlt: Vineyards and Anatolian mountains at sunset
